account.title: Account creation
account.summary: Users can create an account using their email address and verify it through a confirmation email.
account.keywords: signup register create account new account sign up
account.resolution: Click Sign Up, enter your details, verify your email, and sign in.

account.title: Password reset
account.summary: If a user cannot log in, they should reset their password using the Forgot Password option.
account.keywords: password forgot login sign in access reset password
account.resolution: Click Forgot Password, enter the registered email, open the reset email, and create a new password.

account.title: Verification email not received
account.summary: Verification emails may be delayed or filtered into spam.
account.keywords: verification email otp email not received verify account
account.resolution: Check the spam folder, wait a few minutes, resend the verification email, and ensure the email address is correct.

account.title: Account locked
account.summary: Accounts are temporarily locked after multiple failed login attempts.
account.keywords: locked account login failed too many attempts
account.resolution: Wait 30 minutes or reset your password before trying again.

account.title: Change email address
account.summary: Users can update their registered email address.
account.keywords: change email update email registered email
account.resolution: Go to Settings > Account > Change Email and verify the new email.

account.title: Delete account
account.summary: Users may permanently delete their account from account settings.
account.keywords: delete account remove account close account
account.resolution: Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. This action cannot be undone.

subscriptions.title: Free plan
subscriptions.summary: The Free plan includes basic features with limited usage.
subscriptions.keywords: free plan starter free tier basic
subscriptions.resolution: Free plan includes 3 projects, 1 GB storage, and community support.

subscriptions.title: Premium plan
subscriptions.summary: Premium includes advanced analytics, priority support, API access, unlimited projects, and increased storage.
subscriptions.keywords: premium plan pro features subscription paid
subscriptions.resolution: Explain Premium features and compare them with the Free or Standard plan.

subscriptions.title: Upgrade subscription
subscriptions.summary: Users can upgrade their subscription at any time.
subscriptions.resolution: Go to Billing > Upgrade Plan and choose the desired subscription.

subscriptions.title: Downgrade subscription
subscriptions.summary: Users may downgrade at the end of the current billing cycle.
subscriptions.resolution: Downgrade through Billing settings. Changes take effect during the next billing cycle.

subscriptions.title: Free trial
subscriptions.summary: A 14-day free trial is available for new users.
subscriptions.resolution: Users can activate the trial without providing a credit card.

billing.title: Billing issue
billing.summary: Billing issues are usually caused by failed payments, expired cards, or duplicate subscriptions.
billing.keywords: billing payment charge invoice subscription refund
billing.resolution: Verify invoices, payment method, and subscription details before escalating.

billing.title: Payment failed
billing.summary: Payments may fail because of insufficient balance, expired cards, incorrect details, or bank rejection.
billing.keywords: payment failed declined card transaction failed
billing.resolution: Verify card details, available balance, and retry using another payment method.

billing.title: Duplicate charge
billing.summary: Occasionally users may see duplicate transactions.
billing.keywords: charged twice duplicate charge double payment
billing.resolution: Review invoice history and collect payment details before escalating.

billing.title: Refund request
billing.summary: Eligible purchases may be refunded within the refund policy period.
billing.resolution: Verify purchase eligibility and initiate the refund request if applicable.

billing.title: Download invoice
billing.summary: Invoices can be downloaded from Billing settings.
billing.keywords: invoice receipt billing history pdf receipt
billing.resolution: Navigate to Billing > Invoices and download the required invoice.

troubleshooting.title: App crash
troubleshooting.summary: The application crashes unexpectedly during use.
troubleshooting.keywords: crash app not working bug error closes automatically
troubleshooting.resolution: Update the app, restart the device, clear cache, and reinstall if necessary.

troubleshooting.title: Dashboard not loading
troubleshooting.summary: The dashboard does not load after signing in.
troubleshooting.keywords: dashboard loading blank page loading issue
troubleshooting.resolution: Refresh the page, clear browser cache, and verify your internet connection.

troubleshooting.title: Upload failed
troubleshooting.summary: File uploads may fail because of unsupported formats or size limits.
troubleshooting.keywords: upload failed file upload attachment document
troubleshooting.resolution: Verify the file type, ensure it is below 100 MB, and retry.

troubleshooting.title: Slow performance
troubleshooting.resolution: Close unnecessary tabs, restart the browser, clear cache, and check internet speed.

troubleshooting.title: 500 Internal Server Error
troubleshooting.summary: The server encountered an unexpected error.
troubleshooting.resolution: Retry after a few minutes. If the issue persists, escalate.

troubleshooting.title: 404 Error
troubleshooting.summary: The requested page or resource could not be found.
troubleshooting.resolution: Verify the URL and ensure the resource exists.

troubleshooting.title: 403 Forbidden
troubleshooting.summary: The user does not have permission to access the requested resource.
troubleshooting.resolution: Verify permissions and ensure the correct account is being used.

security.title: Enable two-factor authentication
security.summary: Users can enable two-factor authentication to improve account security.
security.resolution: Go to Settings > Security > Enable Two-Factor Authentication.

security.title: Account hacked
security.summary: Users believe their account has been compromised.
security.resolution: Reset the password immediately, enable 2FA, and escalate to human support.

security.title: Data encryption
security.summary: Customer data is encrypted during storage and transmission.
security.resolution: Explain that HTTPS, TLS, and AES-256 encryption are used.

files.title: Supported file formats
files.summary: The application supports multiple document and image formats.
files.keywords: pdf docx txt csv png jpg upload formats
files.resolution: Supported formats are PDF, DOCX, TXT, CSV, JPG, and PNG.

files.title: Maximum upload size
files.summary: Uploaded files must not exceed the supported limit.
files.keywords: file size upload limit maximum size
files.resolution: Maximum supported file size is 100 MB.

api.title: API authentication
api.summary: API requests require Bearer Token authentication.
api.keywords: api authentication bearer token api key
api.resolution: Include Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY in request headers.

api.title: API rate limit
api.summary: API usage is limited to prevent abuse.
api.resolution: The API supports up to 100 requests per minute.

notifications.title: Notifications not received
notifications.summary: Users are not receiving email or push notifications.
notifications.keywords: notification email push alerts not receiving
notifications.resolution: Verify notification settings, spam folder, and device notification permissions.

team.title: Invite team members
team.summary: Administrators can invite new users to collaborate.
team.keywords: invite team member add user collaboration
team.resolution: Go to Settings > Team > Invite User and enter their email address.

backup.title: Automatic backup
backup.summary: The system automatically backs up customer data every 24 hours.
backup.resolution: Explain that automatic backups occur once every 24 hours.

backup.title: Export data
backup.summary: Users can export their data in multiple formats.
backup.resolution: Export data from Settings > Export in CSV, Excel, or PDF format.

support.title: Support hours
support.summary: Customer support is available during business hours.
support.resolution: Support is available Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

support.title: Priority support
support.summary: Premium customers receive faster response times.
support.resolution: Priority support responds within approximately 2 hours.

escalation.title: Cases requiring escalation
escalation.summary: Critical issues should be transferred to a human support agent.
escalation.keywords: escalate escalation human support urgent hacked data loss outage legal refund dispute
escalation.resolution: Collect customer information, summarize the issue, include troubleshooting steps already attempted, and escalate to a human agent.
